queue.title: Add backup substitution telemetry field to engagement-trace.json

outcome.note: Added backup_substitutions extraction to e-posthook-parser.mjs (count + array), shell var BACKUP_SUBSTITUTION_COUNT, 3 schema tests in engagement-trace.test.mjs, and substitution-aware compliance in audit-picker-compliance.mjs

queue.title: Add TODO tracker false-positive rate metric to audit reporting
Switch prehook credential checks to account-manager --fast
queue.description: Now that account-manager supports --fast (3s timeout), hooks calling node account-manager.mjs test/json can use --fast for faster session startup. Candidates: 09-financial-check.sh, engage-blockers.sh, any credential preflight. Should shave ~5s off startup.

outcome.note: Already done: only live caller (02-periodic-checks.sh) uses --fast since wq-874 (s1807). 09-financial-check.sh and engage-blockers.sh do not call account-manager.

queue.title: Create hooks/lib/timeout-wrapper.sh for standard hook timeout behavior
queue.description: The pattern for fixing slow hooks is well-established: per-check timeout N, parallel background jobs, hook-level watchdog, graceful fallback. Create a shared library that any hook can source to get standard timeout+watchdog behavior with minimal boilerplate.

queue.title: Add E/R session cost trend indicators to audit-stats
queue.description: Extend computeBCostTrend pattern to E and R session types. E threshold $1.50, R threshold $2.00. Reuse same arrow/threshold logic from audit-stats.mjs. Output per-type cost trends in audit report alongside existing B cost trend.
